summary: Iteration 126: Backend-only testing of RdP (Richiesta di Preventivo Fornitore) Module. All 14 tests passed (100%). Complete RdP workflow verified: create RdP from preventivo items, record supplier prices, apply markup to update preventivo, convert to OdA in linked commessa, generate PDF, delete RdP. Cascade delete regression passes (5/5 tests).

create_rdp.result: PASS - Creates RdP with supplier_name, items, status=inviata

list_rdp.result: PASS - Returns rdp_list array with all RdPs for preventivo

record_supplier_response.result: PASS - Records prices, calculates total_offered, updates status to risposta_ricevuta

apply_prices_with_markup.result: PASS - Applies supplier_price * (1 + markup_pct/100) to preventivo lines, recalculates totals

generate_pdf.result: PASS - Returns valid PDF with RICHIESTA DI OFFERTA title, proper filename

delete_rdp.result: PASS - Deletes RdP, verified via subsequent GET

critical_code_review_comments: rdp.py: Clean implementation with proper status flow (inviata → risposta_ricevuta → applicata → convertita_oda)
apply-prices correctly recalculates line_total with sconto_1/sconto_2 discounts (lines 194-198)
Preventivo totals (imponibile, total_vat, total) properly recalculated on apply-prices (lines 208-226)
PDF uses WeasyPrint with professional RICHIESTA DI OFFERTA template (lines 364-513)
convert-oda properly pushes OdA to commessa.approvvigionamento.ordini array (lines 297-307)
seed_data_creation: Test RdPs created and cleaned up during tests. Used existing preventivi: prev_20a30dfe55, prev_35c6b96a9e75
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 RdP module backend tests pass. The RdP workflow: 1) Create RdP from preventivo items → 2) Record supplier prices → 3) Apply markup to update preventivo line prices and totals → 4) Convert to OdA in linked commessa → 5) Generate PDF. The rdp_requests collection stores RdPs. OdA is pushed to commessa.approvvigionamento.ordini[]. Cascade delete regression confirmed working.
